title: Netherite Crowns 32x
description: Replaces Netherite Helmets with custom crowns + fitting armor trims.
body:
This pack replaces Netherite Helmets with custom crowns. All armor trims result in the fitting pattern for the crowns. Just choose one of the crowns-versions you like. 

If you want to replace all helmets with crowns, there's another of my packs (find it in my profile).
